"Heroes of this Unstable City. Protect our civilians."

꩜ The Hero au consist of People with gifted powers to people that usually rare

꩜ Powers starts developing around teenage years and with proper training and care, it develops through adulthood

꩜ Every unstable cast has powers, all of them are gifted certain dominant abilities

꩜ Some Unstable cast members are outside the Hero Clan so not everyone is Heroic here..

Hero info:

✮ Hero codename: Wind burst

✮ Powers: Telekinesis (And multiple weapons including his maces, elytra and the canons)

✮ Usually a solo hero. He doesn't know the others personally. (Except Eggchan)

Personal Info:

⊹₊ Wemmbu grew up in a rich family

⊹₊ growing up, his relationship with his parents aren't good due to neglect, although he only had maids to be his parental figures

⊹₊ He is 25 years old

⊹₊ Eggchan is his only friend at the moment, he doesn't bother to get to know the other heroes personally

Note: Eggchan is a hacker type of hero, he used his visionary ability to predict the future and uses the access of every cameras to his advantage

⊹₊ Wemmbu cares for his hair a lot

Hero Clan Info:

⟡ Universal Union (Uu) - an hero organization lead by Blue Sky(Parrotx2) in order to serve justice from their failed government. Due to a rising threat of corrupt powers and unprincipled civilian, the Uu goal to give the city its right justice. slowly yet strongly

⟡ The Hc:Uu is a self funded organization built to prove their capabilities

⟡ Every Hero must have a CodeName to avoid having their private lives be bothered from their missions

⟡ It's the hero's mission to not kill any criminals and civilians as it is their main rule

⟡ Hc:Uu HQ located in an underground bunker in the mountains named District 13

⟡ Other heros identity (At the moment.)

  • Wind Burst - Wemmbu

  • Dusk - Spokeishere

  • Blazer - Flamefrags

  • Blue sky - Parrotx2

  • Witnesser - Eggchan

  • Crimson - Mapicc

  • Vernus - Lomedy (Keep in mind. Lomedy is NOT part of the Clan)

  • Zephyr - Theobaldthebird
